title: colea bernieri
intro: Colea bernieri, also known as African coleus, is a perennial plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Colea bernieri include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Colea bernieri typically involve infusion or decoction, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
